articles.title: Proverb of the Day: 'A tent without a woman is like...' Life lessons on harmony, happiness, sanctuary, emotional connection, mutual support, and why a female's presence is essential to make a home livable
articles.description: Proverb of the Day highlights the saying, “A tent without a woman is like a violin with no strings.” The proverb explains the value of emotional connection, harmony, mutual support, and family life. It compares a home without emotional care to a violin that cannot create music. The teaching remains relevant today as people continue to build relationships through understanding, cooperation, and shared responsibilities.

articles.title: Mamata challenges Bhabanipur election in high court; BJP calls it futile attempt
articles.description: Bengal parliamentary affairs minister Shankar Ghosh took a swipe at Mamata Banerjee for challenging the Bhabanipur results

articles.title: Mons Joseph calls on Vellappally Natesan
articles.description: Water Resources Minister Mons Joseph visits SNDP leader Vellappally Natesan, emphasizing mutual respect and cooperation in public life.

articles.title: Case filed against SP leader and ex-chairman of Kampil Nagar Panchayat
articles.description: Case filed against SP leader and ex-chairman of Kampil Nagar Panchayat

articles.title: Court orders further probe into alleged assault on YC workers by E.P. Jayarajan aboard flight
articles.description: The Thiruvananthapuram Judicial First Class Magistrate Court on Tuesday ordered further investigation into the alleged assault on Youth Congress workers by senior CPI(M) leader E.P. Jayarajan aboard an IndiGo flight during a protest against former Chief Minister Pinarayi Vijayan four years ago.

articles.title: Maharana Pratap Jayanti: CM Sharma extends greetings, hails his ideals
articles.description: Rajasthan CM Bhajan Lal Sharma extended greetings on Maharana Pratap Jayanti, describing him as a symbol of supreme self-respect. He urged citizens to imbibe the iconic ruler's ideals and dedicate themselves to the service of the nation.

articles.title: Can't give relaxation in 30-day notice period for marriage under Special Marriage Act: Delhi High Court
articles.description: Delhi High Court: The Delhi High Court rejected a plea to waive the 30-day notice period under the Special Marriage Act. The court said personal hardship cannot override statutory requirements, and marriages must follow the legal waiting period.

articles.title: BJP attacks Bhagwant Mann after Akal Takht declares him 'anti-Guru'
articles.description: BJP's Shehzad Poonawalla attacked Punjab CM Bhagwant Mann after the Akal Takht reportedly declared him 'anti-Guru'. Poonawalla cited a viral video, alleging Mann insulted Sikh sentiments and called for his resignation on moral grounds.

articles.title: Congress hits back at DMK, tells it to self-introspect, not mock Rahul
articles.description: Congress MP Imran Masood slammed the DMK for mocking Rahul Gandhi, telling them to 'save its own existence'. This follows a DMK mouthpiece article criticising Rahul's 'political immaturity' and Congress undermining INDIA bloc allies in state polls.

articles.title: Trump to release Iran deal text, will read it 'word by word' to media
articles.description: Donald Trump has vowed to release the text of the Iran agreement in a few days, even suggesting he'd read it live to the media. He said the deal's core is to prevent Iran from getting a nuclear weapon and has now agreed to send it to Congress.

articles.title: Annamalai Slams 'Military-Grade' Security For NEET Retest, Says It Defies NEP Goals
articles.description: Annamalai Slams 'Military-Grade' Security For NEET Retest, Says It Defies NEP Goals

articles.title: What are your rights as borrower when bank tries to repossess your vehicle?
articles.description: Demand proper notices, written authorisation, and a possession inventory before surrendering your vehicle

articles.title: Saugata Roy accuses Kakoli Ghosh Dastidar of leading TMC rebellion
articles.description: TMC MP Saugata Roy accused Kakoli Ghosh Dastidar of leading a 20-MP rebellion against Mamata Banerjee. He cited internal conflicts in the group, which has asked the Speaker to merge with the NCPI, a move slammed by other TMC leaders.

articles.title: Priyanka Gandhi on paper leaks: It's a deep systematic problem
articles.description: Priyanka Gandhi Vadra expressed solidarity with students over repeated paper leaks, calling it a systemic issue. Rahul Gandhi will lead a series of student conventions in Kota, Allahabad, Patna, and Delhi to address examination scandals.

articles.title: Puri servitors honour Odisha CM for removing 'Dham' from Digha temple
articles.description: Jagannath Temple servitors in Puri held a civic reception for Odisha CM Mohan Charan Majhi to thank him for getting the word 'Dham' removed from a temple in Digha, West Bengal. Devotees consider Puri the only true Jagannath Dham.

articles.title: Amid 'Operation Tiger' buzz, UBT Sena denies MPs joining Shinde camp
articles.description: Shiv Sena (UBT) MPs Anil Desai and Sanjay Raut dismissed speculation of MPs joining the Eknath Shinde-led faction. They asserted that all leaders continue to have faith in Uddhav Thackeray's leadership, calling the defection rumors baseless.

articles.title: Punjab CM Responds to Akal Takht Verdict, Denies Link to Viral Video
articles.description: Punjab Chief Minister Bhagwant Mann has responded to the Akal Takht's decision declaring him 'Guru Dokhi' and 'Khalsa Panth Virodhi', rejecting allegations linked to a controversial viral video. Mann said he had already appeared before the Akal Takht and clarified that the person seen in the footage was not him. While expressing disappointment over the verdict, he reiterated his respect for the Akal Takht and alleged that a political campaign was being carried out against him under the guise of religion.

articles.title: G7 discusses Ukraine, China; Japan proposes critical minerals plan
articles.description: At the G7 summit, Japanese PM Sanae Takaichi said leaders discussed Ukraine, West Asia, and China. She proposed a 'Joint Stockpiling Collaboration Initiative' for critical minerals and addressed issues like Iran's nuclear program and North Korea.

articles.title: Mexican engineering guild chief removed after racist gesture at Korean World Cup fan
articles.description: A Mexican engineer has lost his leadership role in a professional engineering association after making a racist gesture towards a South Korean football fan

articles.title: Blocking Telegram a bad idea: CBSE OSM whistleblower Sarthak Sidhant flags NTA's ‘incompetency’
articles.description: The Centre has temporarily restricted access to Telegram in India ahead of the NEET-UG 2026 re-examination scheduled for June 21.

articles.title: PM Modi to attend G7 Summit in France
articles.description: On June 17, PM Modi will meet US President Donald Trump. The two leaders are expected to review the progress... The post PM Modi to attend G7 Summit in France appeared first on Pratidin TV - Breaking News & Latest Update .

articles.title: Before The Battle Of Kurukshetra, Lord Krishna Asked For These Five Villages — Here’s What They’re Called Today
articles.description: From Indraprastha to Paniprastha, the five villages Lord Krishna sought for the Pandavas are said to survive in modern India.

articles.title: Trump Grabs, Holds And Won't Let Go As Brigitte Macron Appears To Squirm | WATCH
articles.description: President Donald Trump is facing fresh online backlash after an awkward 15-second handshake with French First Lady Brigitte Macron at the G7 Summit in France went viral. Video of Trump tightly holding Brigitte's hand and appearing to engage in a handshake tug-of-war sparked a flood of reactions on social media. Here's what happened during the uncomfortable G7 greeting and why the internet can't stop talking about it.

articles.title: 'Hindu Dharma not registered': RSS chief Mohan Bhagwat on Priyank Kharge's open letter
articles.description: Priyank Kharge urged the RSS to use its centenary for constitutional reflection, advocating for registration and transparency in its operations.

articles.title: Sorab Bedi reacts to trolling over his comments on Sanchita Ugale after her death: ‘Itna bedil nahi hoon...’
articles.description: Sorab Bedi took to Instagram to react to the trolling over the remarks he made following the death of his Dilwali Dulha Le Jayegi co-star Sanchita Ugale.

articles.description: For now, what exists is not peace, but a claim of peace, says Harikrishnan S.

articles.title: US President Donald Trump May Skip US-Iran Peace Deal Signing, JD Vance Attendance Confirm | News18
articles.description: | President Donald Trump has indicated that he may not attend the formal signing ceremony of the US–Iran peace agreement in Switzerland, despite playing a central role in brokering the deal. Speaking on the sidelines of the G7 Summit, Trump said Vice President JD Vance would "definitely" be present at the Geneva ceremony, while leaving his own participation uncertain. Vance has emerged as a key figure in the negotiations and has maintained that the agreement serves American interests by reopening the Strait of Hormuz and preventing Iran from pursuing nuclear weapons. n18oc_breaking-news News18 Mobile App - https://onelink.to/desc-youtube

articles.title: 'Dham' removed from Digha's Jagannath Temple, Patra hails WB LoP
articles.description: BJP MP Sambit Patra lauded West Bengal LoP Suvendu Adhikari for removing 'Dham' from Digha's Jagannath Temple name. The move, a long-standing demand by devotees who consider Puri the sole 'Jagannath Dham', was widely celebrated in Odisha.

articles.title: Suvendu Adhikari visits KMC, pays respects to Netaji, plans overhaul
articles.description: Suvendu Adhikari visited the KMC office, announcing a major delimitation process to address ward voter disparities. He also launched a five-day cleanliness drive in Kolkata to prepare for Prime Minister Narendra Modi's upcoming visit.

articles.title: Iran war 'has been a strategic disaster for the State of Israel', analyst says
articles.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu is on a collision course with Donald Trump as the U.S. president seeks to extricate himself from the war, with both men's goals unmet and Israeli military operations tied down in Lebanon. Speaking with FRANCE 24's Sharon Gaffney, Aaron David Miller, Senior Fellow at the Carnegie Endowment for International Peace, says that "this has been a strategic disaster for the state of Israel. All of Benjamin Netanyahu's war aims - diminished support for proxies, restrictions on ballistic missiles, overthrow of the regime, or weakening of the regime - none of this has occurred."

Is removal of Trump's name from Kennedy Center a metaphor?
articles.description: In what could be a metaphor for things to come, workers removed President Trump's name from the Kennedy Center in Washington. articles.title: AAP hits out at Delhi govt. over ‘continued demolitions’ in O-zone
articles.description: AAP criticizes Delhi government for ongoing demolitions in protected O-zone, despite assurances from Chief Minister and BJP leaders.

articles.title: ‘Encouraged RACIST, SEXIST behaviour’: Randy Fine explodes at Biden-era NLRB in fiery House hearing
articles.description: A fiery House hearing erupted as Randy Fine launched sharp criticism of the Biden-era National Labor Relations Board (NLRB), accusing the agency of promoting policies he described as discriminatory and demanding answers from its leadership.

articles.title: Lebanon president Aoun welcomes US-Iran deal in call with Iran FM Araghchi
articles.description: Lebanese officials "expressed appreciation" to Araghchi for including the ending of war in Lebanon in the memorandum of understanding with the United States, IRNA said.

articles.title: JD Vance's New Book Reveals His Biggest Regret: 'One of the Dumbest Things I Ever Said'
articles.description: Vice President JD Vance has admitted that his previous remark about “childless cat ladies” was a significant mistake, labeling it as “boneheaded” in his upcoming memoir, Communion. Initially made during his Senate campaign, the comment aimed to critique Democratic leaders but sparked widespread backlash

articles.title: Strait of Hormuz to be 'completely opened' by Friday, says Trump
articles.description: At the G7 Summit, US President Donald Trump said the Strait of Hormuz is 'partially opened' and will be 'completely opened' by Friday following an agreement with Iran. He said the deal is 'all signed' and mine removal is underway.

articles.title: EXCLUSIVE: "Replacing Replaced Image!" — NCERT Chief U-Turns On 'Dancing Girl' Textbook Controversy
articles.description: Following an intense, nationwide debate over historical representation and visual censorship in school curricula, the National Council of Educational Research and Training (NCERT) has officially decided to step back. articles.title: KTR slams CM Reddy's 'incompetence' over Hyderabad Metro Phase-II
articles.description: BRS Working President KTR slammed CM Revanth Reddy's 'incompetence' for failing to secure Central approval for Hyderabad Metro Phase-II, accusing him of lacking influence and bowing to the Centre due to the 'cash-for-vote' case.

articles.description: Political optics dominated Suvendu Adhikari’s first KMC visit as Chief Minister, with Mamata Banerjee’s sister-in-law and rebel MP Mala Roy among the attendees.

articles.title: Amit Shah masterminded Trinamool ‘split’, merger bid, says Congress
articles.description: Congress accuses Amit Shah of orchestrating Trinamool split and merger to secure NDA's two-thirds majority in Lok Sabha.

articles.title: Are Trinamool rebel MPs at risk of disqualification? Legal opinions split
articles.description: The dispute centres on whether the anti-defection law protects a breakaway legislature party with two-thirds support even when the original political party remains intact.

articles.title: American billionaire Bill Ackman writes long post slamming Bernie Sanders’ attack on Elon Musk becoming world’s first trillionaire: ‘Your socialism would never...’
articles.description: Billionaire investor Bill Ackman lauded Elon Musk's trillionaire status, achieved through SpaceX's IPO, countering Senator Bernie Sanders' criticism. Ackman argued Musk's ventures, like Starlink, bring global benefits such as low-cost internet and educational access, driving economic growth and innovation. He emphasized Musk's wealth is tied to company value, not cash, and that such entrepreneurs deserve appreciation for advancing humanity.

articles.title: Dia Mirza's environmental remark on patriarchy sparks backlash; internet says 'Aadmi hona paap ho gaya hai'. Here's what she said
articles.description: Dia Mirza's assertion on a podcast that patriarchy is the cause of climate change has sparked a heated online debate. While critics argue her statement oversimplifies a complex global crisis and unfairly blames men, supporters contend she was referencing historical power structures and initiating a broader discussion on gender and accountability.
